rationale.R1.3: The analysis identifies some claims that are not supported by the evidence (e.g., universal applicability across all conditions).
rationale.RX.1: The analysis does not explicitly discuss uncertainty for each recommendation, but it flags inconsistencies between claims and evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The analysis acknowledges that the method performs better on clean read speech and worse on other conditions, indicating some scope adherence issues.
rationale.RX.4: The analysis points out potential harm in deploying the system on less controlled datasets (e.g., VA-Log) without further investigation.
rationale.RX.5: The analysis does not discuss provenance or traceability of the claims made.
